# Container

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Container;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Container { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
storage, shipping, freight, supply chain, docker, environment, devops, code, coding

development, transportation, mail
